projects.name: static-p2p-pong
projects.description: Pong with rollback netcode, peer to peer over WebRTC. No backend, just two browsers and PeerJS finding each other.

projects.name: curvecrash-RL
projects.description: Trained an RL bot to play CurveCrash. Self-play PPO, IMPALA encoder, exported to TF.js. Race it with arrow keys.

projects.name: FlexVoice
projects.description: Real-time voice to voice. Every link in the chain swaps out. VAD, STT, LLM, TTS, all running local.
